creator: ernsth@nl.euro.net
text:
The port mail/imp fails:

===> Updating mime.types...
===> Updating httpd.conf...
Can't open /usr/ports/www/horde/work/httpd.conf.phplib: No such file or directory
Can't open /usr/ports/www/horde/work/httpd.conf.phplib: No such file or directory
cat: /usr/ports/www/horde/work/httpd.conf.phplib: No such file or directory
*** Error code 1

Fix: 

I wish I had one :-)
How-To-Repeat: cd /usr/ports/mail/imp && make install
